description: Functional safety rules and timing constraints for road vehicles

timing_rules.name: Emergency Brake Response Time
timing_rules.description: From obstacle detection to full brake application, total latency must not exceed threshold
timing_rules.violation_consequence: Vehicle may fail to stop before collision

timing_rules.name: Steering Override Response
timing_rules.description: Emergency steering command must complete within threshold
timing_rules.violation_consequence: Vehicle may not avoid lane departure or obstacle

timing_rules.name: Driver Alert Response
timing_rules.description: Warning alert must reach driver within threshold
timing_rules.violation_consequence: Driver may not have sufficient time to react

timing_rules.name: Pedestrian Detection to Brake
timing_rules.description: From pedestrian detection signal to brake actuation command

timing_rules.name: Lane Departure Warning
timing_rules.description: From lane marking detection to driver warning
timing_rules.violation_consequence: Driver not warned in time of lane departure

timing_rules.name: Adaptive Cruise Control Response
timing_rules.description: ACC must respond to speed changes within threshold

timing_rules.name: Safety Mechanism Activation
timing_rules.description: Hardware safety mechanisms must activate within fault tolerance time interval
timing_rules.violation_consequence: Safety state not reached in time

timing_rules.name: ECU Watchdog Timeout
timing_rules.description: ECU watchdog must detect software failure within timeout period
timing_rules.violation_consequence: Software fault not detected, hazardous state persists

event_chain_rules.name: Sensor Before Decision
event_chain_rules.description: Sensing must complete before any decision is made

event_chain_rules.name: Detection Before Actuation
event_chain_rules.description: Object detection must precede any actuation command

event_chain_rules.name: No Accelerate After Pedestrian
event_chain_rules.description: Vehicle must not accelerate after pedestrian is detected

event_chain_rules.name: Brake After Detection
event_chain_rules.description: Brake must occur only after pedestrian/obstacle detection

asil_decomposition.description: For systems where ASIL D requirements are met through decomposition
